title: SAFE AND SECURE SENIORS INDEPENDENT - 211info
text: CITY OF ALBANY SAFE AND SECURE SENIORS INDEPENDENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adults living independently a way to maintain safe and secure homes with security and fire safety inspections and education, installation of security hardware, work to make house addresses visible, engraving valuables, smoke alarm inspection, installation, and maintenance. Assistance is offered by volunteers and local law enforcement agencies. 333 Broadalbin Street SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Home safety inspection: By appointment only Email (541) 917-7680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 917-7680 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information. Call to schedule a home safety inspection. FEES: Varies by service; most services are no or low-cost DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Albany SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Salem: Take Exit 234-B/Highway 99E onto Pacific Boulevard. Travel on Pacific through six traffic signals, then follow the road to the right-hand exit (sign reads City Center, Corvallis) onto Lyon Street (one-way street) headed north. Move into left lane and proceed to 4th Street. Turn left and continue to the next stop sign on the corner of 4th and Ellsworth. Location will be on the right. From Eugene: Take Exit 233/Highway 20 and turn right onto Highway 20/Santiam Highway. Follow Santiam through six traffic signals; Santiam merges into Pacific Boulevard. Follow the road to the right-hand exit (sign reads City Center, Corvallis) onto Lyon Street (one-way street) headed north. Move into left lane and proceed to 4th Street. Turn left and continue to the next stop sign on the corner of 4th and Ellsworth. Location will be on the right. Accessible by Amtrak, Bolt Bus, Albany Transit System, Linn-Benton Loop, and Linn Shuttle. Services: Fire Prevention Information * Older Adult/Aging Issues Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Older Adult/Aging Issues Home Safety Devices * Older Adult/Aging Issues Smoke Alarms * Older Adult/Aging Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF ALBANY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF ALBANY
